generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance GearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Primary gearbox component interfacing between motor and cycloidal gearbox for torque amplification"
]

instance CycloidalGearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "High-precision cycloidal gearbox reducing rotational speed while increasing torque for precise motion control"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Directly mounted encoder on the motor shaft measuring motor angle with high resolution"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleData
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gearbox measuring gearwheel rotational position to reduce positional uncertainty"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearwheelAngleData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller interface providing real-time input current (I_M) measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentData
]

instance TorqueController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controller deriving torque values (τ_M) from motor constants and current measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorTorqueData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor output angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoder
]

instance GearwheelAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearwheel output angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor torque measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueController
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque values (τ_M, τ_G, τ_out) calculated from motor and gearbox encoder readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTorqueData
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity (ω) measurements from encoder differentials"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance MotorSysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram representing the permanent magnet synchronous motor structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance GearboxSysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram representing the primary gearbox structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance CycloidalGearboxSysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram representing the cycloidal gearbox structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink model implementing Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, and LuGre friction models for system dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationDashboard
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlAlgorithmOptimization
]

instance SimulinkGearModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink model simulating gearbox dynamics including elasticity and friction effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationDashboard
]

instance IdealBehaviorReference : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reference model representing ideal (friction-free) behavior for torque/velocity comparisons"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationDashboard
]

instance FrictionAffectedBehavior : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reference model representing actual behavior with friction effects subtracted for comparison"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationDashboard
]

instance MotorOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor output (ωr_M) derived from Simulink models with friction effects"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleData
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkFrictionModel
]

instance GearwheelOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearwheel output (ωr_G) derived from Simulink gearbox models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearwheelAngleData
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkGearModel
]

instance SystemOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated system output (ωr_out) representing final motion characteristics after friction compensation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorOutputData
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearwheelOutputData
]

instance FrictionMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata tracking source tracing for friction data (MQTT channel IDs, sensor timestamps)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentMQTT
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLToolkit : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling environment for structural representation of motor, gearbox, and cycloidal gearbox components"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance MathWorksSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for executable friction and system dynamics modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataStreaming
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Structured data representation framework for interoperability with digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables AASIntegrationService
]

instance ProcessingComponentMQTT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT-based processing components for traceability of data traces"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationDashboard
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDataStreaming : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming service for sensor data from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance RealTimeFrictionIdentification : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlAction
]

instance VisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Live data aggregation and comparison between measured vs. simulated friction-affected behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceTriggerAction
]

instance ControlAlgorithmOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adaptive friction compensation to reduce motion inaccuracies (targeting 30% reduction)"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterAdjustmentAction
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Creation and maintenance of SysML structural models for system components"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executable simulation of friction models and system dynamics in MathWorks Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

instance AASIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structured data representation and interoperability with digital twin components via Asset Administration Shell"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStandardizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming insights for sensor data acquisition"
]

instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of friction characteristics (static, kinetic, viscous) affecting robot motion"
]

instance AdaptiveControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of control algorithms to compensate for identified friction effects"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of wear, misalignment, or other anomalies through comparison of measured vs. simulated data"
]

instance MaintenanceTriggerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated maintenance scheduling triggered by detected anomalies in friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time adjustment of control parameters to optimize motion accuracy based on friction compensation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Verification of structural models against physical components to ensure accuracy"
]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of simulation results to validate friction models and system dynamics"
]

instance DataStandardizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ensuring consistent data representation across digital twin components for interoperability"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time (low-latency)**, with:
  - **Data acquisition frequency**: Sensor data (e.g., encoders, current) streamed via **MQTT** at operational rates (e.g., per millisecond or second, depending on robot control demands).
  - **Model updates**: Continuous refinement of friction models during operation to account for **wear, load variations, and temperature effects**.
  - **Synchronization**: Live data integration with simulation models (e.g., Simulink) for **multi-physics-aware friction analysis** with sub-second latency."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is **single-axis focused** for the MABI MAX 100 robot’s first axis, comprising:
  - **Physical Twin (PT)**: The robot’s first axis (motor, gearbox, cycloidal gearbox) with embedded sensors (encoders, current).
  - **Digital Shadow (DS)**: A **real-time, data-driven representation** of joint friction behavior, integrating:
    - **Engineering models** (SysML),
    - **Simulation models** (Simulink),
    - **Data traces** (I_M, r_M, r_G, r_out, ˆr_M, ˆr_G, ˆr_out),
    - **Processing components** (Simulation M, GW, GB) for friction model updates.
  - **Dashboard**: Unified visualization of measured vs. simulated data for friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates across:
  - **As-designed stage**: Structural SysML models define the robot’s first axis architecture (motor, gearbox, cycloidal gearbox).
  - **As-operated stage**: Real-time friction modeling and control during **machining operations** (e.g., milling) to improve positional accuracy (0.06 mm repeatability, 0.1 mm positional accuracy). The digital shadow is **operational-time focused**, enabling continuous friction adaptation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification/Validation**:
    - **SysML models** (BDD/IBD) validate structural integrity of the first axis.
    - **Simulink simulations** validate friction models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous) against real-time data.
  - **Uncertainty management**:
    - **Encoder-based torque estimation** (motor vs. gearbox encoders) reduces positional uncertainty.
    - **Live data integration** (MQTT) ensures real-time alignment between physical and digital representations.
  - **Traceability**: Metadata links data points to their sources (e.g., sensor IDs, model parameters) for accountability."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection uses:
  - **MQTT protocol** for real-time sensor data streaming from the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** for structured data representation and interoperability with digital twin components.
  - **SysML models** (BDD/IBD) for physical system documentation.
  - **MathWorks Simulink** for executable simulation models (friction, dynamics) linked to data traces."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to:
  - **SysML** for structural modeling (BDD/IBD),
  - **MathWorks Simulink** for simulation models,
  - **MQTT protocol** for real-time data exchange,
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)** for traceability and metadata standards (e.g., data traces, sources, models)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
  - **Real-time data integrity**: MQTT ensures low-latency, reliable streaming of sensor data.
  - **Autonomous operation**: The digital shadow is **passive** (one-way data flow) and does not autonomously act on the physical system (no virtual-to-physical feedback loops).
  - **Human-in-the-loop**: Dashboard visualization requires operator intervention for critical decisions (e.g., maintenance).
  - **No remote execution**: The system does not enable remote control of the robot, mitigating human safety risks."
]
